svg.title: Dock Back Wall (Fitting Mount Wall) — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 4. 4x TUBE PASS-THROUGH HOLES: ⌀7mm THRU WITH ⌀11mm x 2mm DEEP
COUNTERBORE ON REAR FACE FOR RUBBER GROMMET (7mm ID, ~11mm OD)
5. TUBE STUB SPACING: 40mm HORIZ x 28mm VERT CENTER-TO-CENTER
7. POGO PIN MOUNT AREA ON TOP SURFACE (Z=80-84): SEE POGO PIN MOUNT DWG
8. DRAINAGE CHANNEL ON TOP SURFACE SLOPES AWAY FROM POGO PIN POCKETS
10. HOLE PATTERN CENTERED ON WALL FACE: LEFT/RIGHT MARGINS = 54mm
